name: peek-mcp
description: Read Claude Code and Codex CLI sessions from disk and expose them via MCP.
long_description: peek-mcp watches local Claude Code (~/.claude/projects) and Codex CLI (~/.codex/sessions) JSONL session files and exposes session_latest, session_list, and session_get tools so a second model can review what a primary agent produced without re-summarisation.

tools.name: session_full
tools.description: Turns, plan, and git diff for a session in one call.

tools.name: session_latest
tools.description: Last N turns from the most recent session.

tools.name: session_get
tools.description: Last N turns from a specific session by ID.

tools.name: session_diff
tools.description: Pre-computed git diff for a session, refreshed on each new turn. Executes local git binary in the session's working directory.

claude_home.title: Claude Code home
claude_home.description: Override the Claude Code session root.

diff_target.title: Diff target
diff_target.description: Override the branch to diff against for session_diff.
